docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY ULTAN LAWANDA AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS ANTHONY-MERIDIAN GALLERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-09-1995 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07 TRIAL OF NOV-29-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS ANTHONY-MERIDIAN GALLERY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ULTAN LAWANDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS ANTHONY-MERIDIAN GALLERY $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,230.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS ANTHONY-MERIDIAN GALLERY HEARING SET FOR APR-12-1995 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF APR-12-1995, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS ANTHONY-MERIDIAN GALLERY
